name: Coral Edge TPU doorway counter
description: Edge-TPU YOLO + tracker + horizontal line crossing → logged crossings in SQLite. Annotated stream lands on the dashboard as a derived tile.
use_case: Pi + Coral USB on a doorway or hallway. Inference cost is ~1-2 W on the TPU vs ~6 W for CPU YOLO. Drop in your own Edge-TPU-compiled .tflite or one from the pycoral examples.
